metadata.title: SBMM ABP — EA Engineering Historical Soil Samples (Areas Between Waste Piles 1 and 2)
metadata.depths: Surface (0-0.5/0-1 ft) primary; 1-1.5 ft as *_sub; FULL vertical profile (incl 1-2, 2-3, 3-4 ft where present) in properties.profile[].
metadata.note: 59 EA locations. Field duplicates excluded. Deeper-profile depths were stored as Excel dates in source and have been decoded back to depth intervals.
